factions.name: Sons of Horus
factions.subtitle: XVI Legion · The Luperci
factions.lore: History records that it is the Sons of Horus Legion who lit the spark of rebellion and stood upon the ashes of the old Imperium. They above all others stand as a byword for treason to their foes, and as exemplars of resistance to adherents. They are the force of ambition, ruthlessness, and unbowed determination. Led by their charismatic Primarch Horus Lupercal, their every action is driven by a burning desire to carve out their own destiny in the stars.

legionTrait.name: Death Dealers
legionTrait.description: When taking an Engage action, Infantry units add +1 to their Firefight value (up to a maximum of 2+).

compositionRules: Max 3 Support detachments per Line detachment in the army.
Max 1/3 of total points value may be spent on Lords of War or Allies.
Reaver, Luperci and Justaerian Detachments: 1 per 2,000 pts each.
Primarch Horus may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander.

formations.name: Assault Detachment
formations.composition: 8 Assault units (+25 each additional, up to 10)

formations.name: Breacher Detachment
formations.composition: 8 Breacher units (+25 each additional, up to 10)

formations.name: Terminator Detachment
formations.composition: 4 Terminator units (+75 each additional, up to 6)

formations.name: Outrider Squad
formations.composition: 4 Outriders OR Attack Bikes (+25 each, up to 6)

formations.name: Javelin Attack Speeder Squadron
formations.composition: 4 Javelin Attack Speeders (+50 each, up to 6)

formations.name: Land Raider Squadron
formations.composition: 4 Land Raiders Phobos OR Proteus (+75/+65 each, up to 6)

formations.name: Superheavy Squadron
formations.composition: 1 Fellblade OR Glaive (+250 each, up to 3)

upgrades.name: Standard Transport
upgrades.description: Add enough Rhino carriers to transport the entire formation after all other upgrades are added. You may upgrade 1 Rhino to a Damocles.

upgrades.name: Drop Assault
upgrades.description: The formation may deploy via Drop Pods. Use Spacecraft pool for Drop Pods.

upgrades.name: Heavy Transport
upgrades.description: Add enough Land Raiders OR Spartans OR Termites OR Mastodons to transport the entire formation after all other upgrades are added.

upgrades.name: Assault Claw
upgrades.description: Add enough Kharybdys OR Cestus Assault Rams to transport the entire formation after all other upgrades are added.

upgrades.name: Teleport
upgrades.description: Add the Teleport trait to each INF unit in the formation.

upgrades.name: Consul
upgrades.description: Add 1 Champion, Librarian or Chaplain. One Champion per force may be upgraded to a Commander.

upgrades.name: Dreadnought
upgrades.description: Add 1-2 Castraferrum, Contemptor, Leviathan or Deredeo dreadnoughts in any combination.

upgrades.name: Support Squads
upgrades.description: Add 1-4 Tactical Support or Heavy Support units.

upgrades.name: Tank
upgrades.description: Add 1-2 tanks: Predators, Sicarans, Vindicators, Cerberus, Typhons or Kratos.

upgrades.name: Armoury Asset
upgrades.description: Upgrade 1-2 vehicles in this formation to special variants (Infernus, Executioner, Scorpius, Omega, Venator, Achilles, Deredeo, Vindicator Destroyer).

champion.name: Champion
notes: May be upgraded to Commander (1 per force).

mastodon.name: Mastodon

weapons.name: 2× Heavy Flamer

notes: Transport (10 Tactical/Breacher/Terminator/Dread; Terminators & Dreads count as 2).

kharybdys.name: Kharybdis Assault Claw
notes: Transport (4 Assault/Breacher/Rapier/Tactical OR 2 Terminator OR 1 Castraferrum/Contemptor).

contemptor.name: Contemptor Dreadnought

weapons.name: Arm options (select 2)
weapons.firepower: TL Heavy Bolter 30cm AP4+ · Multimelta 15cm & (15cm) AP5+/AT5+ MW · Kheres Assault Cannon 15cm & (15cm) AP4+/AT5+ EA(+1) · Plasma Cannon 30cm AP5+/AT5+ Fleshbane · Powerfist (base) (assault) MW EA(+1)

notes: May replace 1 arm with Conversion Beamer (+20).
1–2 per formation may take Conversion Beamer.

weapons.name: Arm options (select 2)
weapons.firepower: Siege Claw/Drill (base) (assault) MW EA(+1) Siege · Gravflux Bombard 15cm 2× AP4+/AT4+ Disrupt · Cyclonic Melta Lance 15cm & (15cm) AP5+/AT3+ MW · Stormcannon 15cm & (15cm) 2× AP4+/AT6+ EA(+1)

notes: May replace Snub Autocannon for Volkite Saker (+15) or Neutron Cannon (+15).

thunderhawk-transporter.name: Thunderhawk Transporter
notes: Transport (2 armoured vehicles OR 1 Land Raider/Spartan AND up to 4 INF in same formation).

weapons.name: Siege Melta Array & 2× TL Heavy Flamer
weapons.firepower: (assault) MW, Siege, EA (+2) / AP4+, Ignore cover / (small arms) Ignore cover

notes: Transport (10 Breacher/Dreadnought/Tactical/Terminator; Terminators & Dreads count as 2).

falchion.name: Falchion
notes: Critical Hit: Destroyed; all units within 5cm suffer a standard hit on 6+.

weapons.name: Fellblade Cannon & 2× Quad Lascannon & TL Heavy Bolter & Demolisher Cannon
weapons.firepower: AP2+/AT2+, TK (1) / AT3+ / AP4+ / AP4+/AT4+, MW, Ignore cover / (small arms) MW, EA (+1)

weapons.name: Volkite Carronade & 2× Quad Lascannon & TL Heavy Bolter

weapons.name: TL Avenger Cannon & Hellstrike Missiles & 2× Quad Heavy Bolter OR 2× Reaper Cannons
2× TL Lascannon & Rotary Missiles

stormbird.name: Stormbird Assault Dropship

notes: Transport (12 Assault/Breacher/Dread/Tactical/Terminator OR 8 Outrider/Attack Bike OR 5 Scimitar Jetbikes; may also transport non-WE transports of the formation; Terminators & Dreads count as 2).

strike-cruiser.name: Strike Cruiser
notes: Transport (20 INF/Scimitar + 20 AV/Land Raider/Spartan + 6 Thunderhawks + 2 Stormbirds + drop assets).

battleship.name: Battle Barge
notes: Transport (60 INF/Scimitar + 60 AV/Land Raider/Spartan + 9 Thunderhawks + 4 Stormbirds + drop assets).
